title: Senior Product Designer
_verificationNote: Verified live via Greenhouse (200, full job description, rawLength 5229). Mochi Health — AI-driven healthcare marketplace connecting patients to providers, transparent pharmacy pricing, and affordable medications. 'Profitable & explosive growth', no VC funding. Senior Product Designer reports to Head of Design. 3+ years required; ideally founding designer background. Experience with Claude Code, Figma & Framer desired. $180K-$225K base + equity. Onsite San Francisco (5 days/week).
